economic_notes: Nation has extensive business portfolio including forestry (Chu Cho Forestry LLP), environmental services (Chu Cho Environmental LLP), and various other partnerships. Earnings from investments in Nation partnerships and business entities totalled $3,565,848 in 2024. BC Hydro revenue of $13,198,838 suggests significant impact benefit agreements. Province of BC funding of $18,379,591 is notable. Victoria Foundation endowment of $16,065,948 held in perpetuity not recorded in statements.
notes: Large complex consolidation with 9 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 11 GBEs/partnerships accounted for by modified equity method. Revenue increased significantly from $44.2M to $57.7M, driven by large increase in Province of BC transfers ($9.7M to $18.4M) and BC Hydro revenue ($5.7M to $13.2M). Deferred revenue increased by $20.7M in the year per cash flow statement, suggesting significant unspent project funding. Victoria Foundation endowment of $16,065,948 is held in perpetuity and excluded from financial statements. Nation adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard effective April 1, 2023 with no restatement of prior periods. Balance sheet details (current liabilities, long-term debt, tangible capital assets) not fully extracted from provided text. Repayment of promissory note $662,237 also occurred during year.
